title: Xin Wudaishi: New History of the Five Dynasties, Selection 3
description: From Xin Wudaishi: New History of the Five Dynasties: chapter 3
introduction: From Xin Wudaishi: New History of the Five Dynasties: chapter 3

translation.text: From Xin Wudaishi: New History of the Five Dynasties: A foundational chapter of one of China's official Twenty-Four Histories, recording the deeds, institutions, and biographies of an entire dynasty.
